component.name: Button
component.description: High-emphasis CTAs with **Property 1** colorways: **Note** (**Semantic/Activity/Note**), **Material** (**Semantic/Activity/Material**), **Job/Session** primary (**Brand/Accent** + shadow from **Brand/Primary**), plus **Button XL** (**Brand/Primary** + shadow from **Brand/Primary**). **Primary+MORE** (Note): **MARK COMPLETED** + white **Foundation/Border/Subtle** stroke, **51px**-tall ⋮ column (**Foundation/Text/Primary**). **Primary+Delete**: **Job/Session** primary fixed **279px** wide; delete/more chrome: white fill, **1px Foundation/Border/Subtle**, **Radius/8**, trash **Semantic/Status/Error/Text**.

rowHeights.primaryWithDelete: hug — row `alignItems: stretch`; primary py 17; **Job/Session** primary **279px** wide; delete column py 18 + icon
rowHeights.primaryWithMore: hug — **18px** row gap; MORE column **51px** height, **4px** vertical padding, ⋮ centered; row **alignItems: flex-start**.
rowHeights.brandPrimaryXl: hug — Spacing/24 vertical padding + metric label

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Button (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.label: fieldsolo-cta-label (uppercase TEXT in single-button variants; primary side of +Delete / +MORE)
figmaLayerNames.primary: fieldsolo-cta-primary (note save / SAVE CHANGES / MARK COMPLETED row)
figmaLayerNames.codeDataNames: `fieldsolo-cta-xl` on XL button; `fieldsolo-cta-with-delete` on Primary+Delete row; `fieldsolo-cta-with-more` on Primary+MORE row.

codeProps.variant: notePrimary | notePrimaryWithDelete | notePrimaryWithMore | materialPrimary | materialPrimaryWithDelete | jobSessionPrimaryWithDelete | brandPrimaryXl
codeProps.primaryLabel: optional override of default uppercase label

notes: 2026-04-08: `FieldSoloCtaButton` in `fieldsolo-cta/` from Figma `1287:1563`; trash is inline SVG to match Edit Session sheet.
2026-04-11: Figma **hug height** — paired **+Delete** rows use `alignItems: stretch` so the trash column matches primary height.

2026-04-12: Figma update — delete/more chrome uses **Foundation/Border/Subtle** (replaces brand-alpha stroke); **Button XL** shadow from **Brand/Primary**; **Primary+MORE** ⋮ column **51px** tall; **Primary+Delete Job/Session** primary **279px** wide.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `1287:1563` — `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and variant masters. Structural renames: `fieldsolo-cta-label` on label TEXT nodes; `Button Primary+Delete` frames → `fieldsolo-cta-primary`, `fieldsolo-cta-delete`, `fieldsolo-cta-delete-icon`. Single-TEXT variants (Primary / XL) keep label-only structure. No `flatten()` in automation. `FieldSoloCtaButton.tsx` uses `data-name` for primary, XL, with-delete row, label, delete, and delete-icon wrapper.

2026-04-08: **Note** (`1279:351`), **Material** (`1283:351`), and **Edit Job, Session** (`1284:789`) use color-matched instances: **Primary Note** / **Primary+Delete Note**, **Primary Material** / **Primary+Delete Material**, **Primary+Delete Job/Session** respectively.
2026-04-08: Added **Job/Session** primary-only master `1808:1151` for parity with Figma; React uses `jobSessionPrimaryWithDelete` only until a sheet needs single-primary Job/Session.
